title: Your AI Agent Needs a Tool
summary: This video explains how AI agents use tool calling to move beyond static responses and access real-time data or take actions. It covers why tools are essential, the mechanics of tool calling with schema and handlers, building custom tools in Python, and the Model Context Protocol as a tool standard.
writeup: This AWS Developers video explains tool calling, the mechanism that turns AI agents from chatbots that guess into systems with real-time data access. It breaks down tool architecture into three parts (schema, description, and handler) and walks through the loop in which the model requests a tool and the framework executes it. The video also covers how system prompts guide tool selection. The practical upshot: well-defined tool descriptions and schemas, combined with the right system prompt, determine whether an agent reliably calls the correct tool.
